reviews.review_description: Map.kakao.com 🗺️and map.naver.com 🌍 for K-pop 🎶tour and language😽learning, Samsung🚝and LG phone📱,KIA🚗and snow❄️skining,the BJ using KoreaTelcom/LGU+or South Korea telecom ISP ☎️?

I thought it was just for 180 videos, but there are a lot of mini games(3d/interactive). My favorite is VR karaoke. I can sing k-pop songs with AfreecaTV's popular singer in virtual space like sutidos and concert hall. I wish there were more songs.
AfreecaTV is the most famous Internet broadcasting platform in Korea. All the good K contents are provided in the VR environment. e-Sports such as PUBG and GSL can be viewed on a big or multi-screen.
It won’t open or load the page?
I think I used to restream to afreeca. I might have also gotten my name into the image of the afreeca app. Let me check. Yeah. I did.
this needs to be made harder to sign up for due to all the kids using adults headsets. the app is ok  but i did see videos for adults only not just gaming videos on here sexual stuff too
